hero.desc: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of machine learning and practical software engineering. Focused on medical AI and real-world applications.

about.heading:
Turning data
into decisions
paragraphs: I'm a computer science student specialising in AI and machine learning, with hands-on experience building production-ready systems that solve real problems.
My work spans medical image analysis, conversational AI, and web-integrated machine learning — with a focus on clean code, reproducible models, and interfaces people can actually use.
Currently completing my B.Tech at Siddarth Institute of Science and Technology, expected to graduate in 2026.

projects.title: Kidney Stone Detection Web App
projects.desc: A web application that detects kidney stones from medical images using a trained convolutional neural network. Integrated with a Flask backend and a clean, accessible frontend designed for clinical use.

projects.title: HematoVision — Blood Cell Classification
projects.desc: Developed during an internship, this model classifies blood cell images into diagnostic categories using transfer learning. Aimed at improving efficiency for medical professionals in haematology workflows.

projects.title: Real-Time Human–Computer Interaction Using Computer Vision
projects.desc: The Gesture Control System is a real-time Human–Computer Interaction (HCI) application that allows users to control system-level operations using hand gestures captured via webcam. It combines MediaPipe, OpenCV, and Flask to provide live gesture recognition, backend processing, and a web-based dashboard.

points: Developed a project on Rising Water Flood Detection using machine learning techniques.
Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model training for accurate predictions.
Designed a system to analyze water level trends and detect potential flood risks early.
Worked with Python, NumPy, Pandas, and data visualization tools.
Enhanced skills in model evaluation, debugging, and optimization.
Collaborated in a guided learning environment with mentorship and periodic assessments.
experience.outcome: The Rising Water Flood Detection system enables early warning by analyzing environmental data, helping in disaster preparedness and risk management.

points: Completed a 2-month programme focused on applied machine learning.
Built and deployed ML models on real-world datasets.
Collaborated with a remote team on end-to-end project delivery.
Built Python applications across automation, data analysis, and visualisation.
Developed strong foundations in scripting, OOP, and library ecosystems.
